name: @shamu/adapter-opencode
description: OpenCode AgentAdapter for Shamu. Wraps @opencode-ai/sdk; SSE-HTTP transport (the reference adapter for the SSE-HTTP transport class). Owns the spawned OpenCode server subprocess via createOpencode(), or attaches to an existing server via createOpencodeClient(). Normalizes SSE events into the shared AgentEvent schema; enforces path-scope + shell-gate at tool dispatch.
